title: 4pk BLACK 10" Gold Rush Gravity Trap Gold Pan - High Impact Flexible Plastic
description:
Used for prospecting and testing of deposits of heavy minerals The Professional Gold Pan features riffled traps to catch your gold as the lighter material flows out of the pan, a wide textured bottom for efficient separation of your remaining black sands and deep black color to highlight even fine gold in the bottom of your pan. This light weight but super tough pan is a top-quality gold getter and will hold up to years of prospecting.
